title: Plzeň,  — Cost of Living, Housing & Relocation Guide [2026]
description: Complete guide to Plzeň, : cost of living, home prices, neighborhoods, remote work readiness, and relocation tips.
content:
Overview

Plzeň is a city in with a population of 175,000. The birthplace of Pilsner beer, a charming West Bohemian city with a beautiful Gothic cathedral, historic brewery, and strong industrial heritage.

Last updated: July 19, 2026
